summary.intent: Diagnose and fix a failing CI test `testDependRetryExhausted` in `FrameCompleteHandlerTests` for the OpenCue/cuebot project.
summary.outcome: Root cause identified: the test spy only intercepted `satisfyWhatDependsOn(FrameInterface)` but not `satisfyWhatDependsOn(LayerInterface)`, allowing the LAYER_ON_LAYER dependency to be satisfied via the unspied layer-level call. A fix was applied by adding a matching spy for `LayerInterface` sharing the same `callCount`.

repo: OpenCue/cuebot uses EmbeddedPostgres (zonky) and Spring Boot test context for integration tests.

`FrameCompleteHandler.satisfyDependsWithRetry` swallows exceptions on retry exhaustion (logs and returns) rather than propagating them, allowing execution to continue to layer-level dependency satisfaction.

LAYER_ON_LAYER dependencies are satisfied via a separate `satisfyWhatDependsOn(LayerInterface)` call that runs after the frame-level `satisfyWhatDependsOn(FrameInterface)` call, triggered when `isLayerComplete` returns true.

code.finding: `executeDependWithRetry` helper asserts `dependCount==1` at line 498; `testDependRetryExhausted` calls it at line 523. The spy using a shared `callCount` must cover both FrameInterface and LayerInterface overloads of `satisfyWhatDependsOn`.

workflow: Search for `FAILED` in Gradle CI logs to quickly identify failing test names and their stack traces.
When a Mockito spy doesn't intercept a call, check for method overloads — the unspied overload may silently succeed and mask the intended test behavior.

friction: CI log was described as 'gigantic', making it hard to locate the failing test without knowing the right keywords.
Multiple rounds of Grep were needed to locate the retry/dependency logic across production and test code.
The test was interrupted before local test execution could confirm the fix.
open_items: Local test run (`./gradlew test --tests "*FrameCompleteHandlerTests"`) was interrupted — fix needs to be validated before merging.
Verify that the added `LayerInterface` spy doesn't break `testDependRetrySucceedsOnSecondAttempt` and other retry-related tests that share `executeDependWithRetry`.
